prompt:
Chinese style CG illustration, Tang Dynasty aesthetics, exquisite ancient woman, half-body close-up shot, focus on face and upper body, high-end portrait composition, cinematic camera language and spatial perspective.

Character Setting:
East Asian classical beauty, cold white transparent skin, fine and real skin texture, soft shimmer; exquisite and three-dimensional facial features but natural and not exaggerated, narrow phoenix eyes, slightly tilted eye corners, affectionate and shy eyes, slightly tipsy and hazy, long eyelashes casting subtle shadows; lip color like rouge, slightly parted lips, soft and emotional tension, presenting 'subtle Oriental beauty'.

Styling Design:
Pink-toned gorgeous Tang-style clothing, softly fitting the body curves, rich layers but not over-stacked; moderate low-neck design emphasizing collarbone and neck-shoulder lines, natural visual guidance; exquisite phoenix crown (metal, pearls, gems, tassels), realistic material reflection, moving slightly with action.

Dynamics and Pose:
Slightly side-turned or lightly rotating posture, neck extension, shoulder lines stretched, hands forming soft guide lines, enhancing picture rhythm and feminine soft tension.

Lighting System:
Cinematic lighting. Key light: warm gold front-side light focusing on face and skin highlights. Fill light: cold ambient light shaping volume and space. Rim light outlining hair and neck silhouette. Highlights controlled without overexposure, shadows retaining details, soft transition of facial light and shadow.

Art Style:
Ultra-realistic CG portrait merged with Oriental freehand charm, slight hazy aesthetics.

Atmosphere and Texture:
Dreamy, subtle, high-end atmosphere of Oriental aesthetics; blurred background to weaken environment and strengthen character; slight film grain + soft focus glow to enhance emotion and texture.

Color System:
Main colors: rouge pink, gold. Auxiliary colors: cold blue-gray. Overall low saturation and high quality, avoiding gaudiness.

Lens parameters:
85mm portrait lens, f1.4–f2, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing.

Quality:
ultra detailed, 8K–16K, extreme detail, high resolution, cinematic lighting.

Aspect Ratio:
9:16
